configurations.name: pantry-host
runtimeArgs: set -a && source .env.local && export DEFAULT_THEME=claude && set +a && npx @limlabs/rex dev --root packages/app --host 0.0.0.0

configurations.name: graphql-server
runtimeArgs: cd packages/app && set -a && source ../../.env.local && set +a && npx tsx graphql-server.ts

configurations.name: mcp-server
runtimeArgs: cd packages/mcp && set -a && source ../../.env.local && set +a && npx tsx src/index.ts --http

configurations.name: pantry-host-prod
runtimeArgs: set -a && source .env.local && export DEFAULT_THEME=claude && set +a && cd packages/app && rex build && rex start --host 0.0.0.0

configurations.name: graphql-server-prod
runtimeArgs: cd packages/app && set -a && source ../../.env.local && export DATABASE_URL=postgres://jpdevries@100.125.77.118:5432/pantry_host && set +a && npx tsx graphql-server.ts
